theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Choose how the app looks, or sync with your system settings

enable_customization.label: Enable customization
enable_customization.description: Customize how AI responds to you

personality.label: AI Personality
personality.description: Set the style and tone AI uses when responding

custom_instructions.label: Custom instructions
custom_instructions.placeholder: Additional behavior, style, and tone preferences
custom_instructions.description: Provide additional context about how you want the AI to behave

more.label: More about you
more.placeholder: Share additional context about yourself that might help AI provide better responses

encrypt_api_keys.label: Encrypt API Keys
encrypt_api_keys.description: Store API keys encrypted using your system's secure storage (Keychain, DPAPI, or libsecret). When enabled, you may be prompted for your system password.
encrypt_api_keys.warning: When enabling encryption, you may be prompted for your system password to secure the API keys.

ai_config.title: Multi-Step Tool Execution Limits
ai_config.description: Configure how many steps the AI can take when using tools. The actual step count is calculated dynamically based on the number of available tools.

how_it_works.title: How it works:
how_it_works.note: Prevents infinite loops while allowing complex operations

developer_mode.title: Developer Mode
developer_mode.label: Advanced Runtime Controls
developer_mode.simple_desc: Runtimes install automatically in the background. Perfect for getting started.
developer_mode.advanced_desc: Full control over runtime installation and configuration. Shows technical details and confirmation dialogs.
developer_mode.warning: Advanced mode shows technical terminology and requires manual confirmations for runtime installations.

runtimes.title: Runtime Management
runtimes.description: Manage Node.js and Python runtimes for MCP servers. Only visible in Developer Mode.
runtimes.note: This section is only available when Developer Mode is enabled.

preference.title: Runtime Priority
preference.levante_desc: Downloads and manages runtimes in ~/levante/. Enables tracking and automatic cleanup.
preference.system_desc: Uses system Node/Python when available. Not tracked or managed by Levante.

runtimes.empty_state: No runtimes installed yet. They will be installed automatically when needed.
